tools.name: lucky_run
tools.description: Execute a Lucky program by compiling and running it through the Lucky LTP runtime. Provide Lucky source code and a goal to pursue.

goal.description: The goal name to pursue (entry point in the Lucky program)

context.description: Execution context dictionary with project-specific variables (e.g. repo URL, branch, user info)

mode.description: Execution mode. 'sync' waits for completion and returns the result. 'async' starts execution and returns an execution_id for status polling.

tools.name: lucky_status
tools.description: Check the status of a running Lucky program execution.

execution_id.description: The execution ID returned by a previous lucky_run call in async mode

tools.name: lucky_approve
tools.description: Respond to a human approval request from a running Lucky program. Use this when a Lucky execution pauses and requests approval for a sensitive action (e.g. deployment, data modification).

approval_id.description: The approval request ID to respond to

decision.description: Your decision: 'approve' to allow the action, 'reject' to deny it, or 'modify' to approve with changes
